message:
CI: Use ubuntu-latest runners

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/dk1kftun1zq9qhg9ip6cllew

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ on:
 jobs:
   check:
     name: Lint, Type Check, Unit Tests
-    runs-on: namespace-profile-default
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ jobs:
 
   e2e:
     name: E2E Tests
-    runs-on: namespace-profile-default
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ jobs:
 
   build:
     name: Build
-    runs-on: namespace-profile-default
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ jobs:
 
   deploy:
     name: Deploy to Cloudflare
-    runs-on: namespace-profile-default
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: [check, e2e, build]
     if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push' }}
     environment:
